title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMLeisure
description: A place for leisure, sports, or recreation from OpenStreetMap tagged with leisure=*. Includes parks, sports pitches, swimming pools, stadiums, etc

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMLeisure

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OSM element

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification

leisureType.description: Property. The OSM leisure tag classifying the facility. Enum:'park, pitch, swimming_pool, sports_centre, stadium, playground, garden, nature_reserve, marina...'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:leisure'

sport.description: Property. The specific sport played here (e.g. soccer, tennis, basketball). Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:sport'

surface.description: Property. The physical surface of the pitch or track. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:surface'

lit.description: Property. Indicates whether the facility is illuminated. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:lit'

fee.description: Property. Indicates whether an entrance or usage fee is required. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:fee'

openingHours.description: Property. Opening hours of the facility

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources
